TextView.android:text:
The path to your goals isn't paved by giant leaps, but by the small, consistent actions you take today.
Every choice to stay focused, every moment of discipline, and every positive habit you reinforce builds the foundation for your future self.
Progress isn't always linear, and some days will feel slower than others, but trust the system you’ve built for yourself.
Stay patient with your growth, remain intentional with your time, and remember that even the smallest step forward is still a victory.
Keep showing up—your consistency is your greatest strength.
